title: Discerning The Eldritch Reimagined
description: Transforms the bulky 3D icons from Discerning The Eldritch into clean, stylish 2D visuals inspired by classic Minecraft
body:
![av](https://i.imgur.com/pON2qFJ.png)

## About

Discerning The Eldritch Reimagined converts the bulky 3D GUI and item icons from Dungeons And Combat x Iron's Spells into a clean, vanilla-style 2D interface, making menus easier to read, visuals lighter, and the overall experience more immersive.

ℹ️ **Important:** This pack only affects the **GUI, HUD, and item icons**.  
It does not change world models, blocks, or gameplay mechanics.

**P.S.** You are welcome to use this resource pack in your modpacks

![alt text](https://i.imgur.com/atj4MYy.png)

![alt text](https://i.imgur.com/0c9f3pn.png)

### What this resource pack changes:

*   11 items redesigned with clean **2D icons**
*   Bulky 3D GUI elements replaced with flat, readable visuals
*   Simplified **3D models** in vanilla Minecraft style
*   Improved readability during combat and inventory management

![alt text](https://i.imgur.com/krDOocQ.png)

❔ **Will this pack break my game or the mod?**  
✅ No. This is a standard resource pack that only modifies visual elements and is completely safe to use.

❔ **Do I need OptiFine?**  
✅ No. The pack works perfectly without OptiFine.

❔ **Will new items be supported in future updates?**  
✅ Yes! New 2D icons and simplified 3D models will be added as Dungeons And Combat x Iron's Spells receives updates.

![alt text](https://i.imgur.com/YOt9ujd.png)

*   **Original Mod Author:** [Ace_The_Eldritch_King](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/discerning-the-eldritch) — thanks for the amazing mod!

> **⚖️ Rights:** This project is a fan-made resource pack. All rights for the original mod belong to its creator, Ace_The_Eldritch_King. We are simply enhancing its visual presentation.
